notes: All non-blocked tasks done. Blocked: React hooks (needs jsdom/testing-library). IMPORTANT: contracts refactored to USDC fee model (commit 4a447535) — InkdTreasury.initialize now takes 4 params (owner, usdc, arweaveWallet, buybackWallet). InkdIntegration.t.sol fully rewritten for USDC model. Always check git status before reading counts from JSON. workspace auto-save bot must not run git add -A from builds/inkd-protocol — it deletes tracked test files. Remaining low-coverage items in API: index.ts (0% — module-level server startup) still impractical to unit test. CLI low-coverage: config.ts color branch (requires module re-import with isTTY=true), index.ts main().catch() handler (module-level side effect), agentd.ts humanLine else-if branch (V8 tracking issue). Remaining API gaps: agents.ts lines 49/109/140 and projects.ts lines 156/227/264 are V8 quirks (dead-code ternary + Express req.params ??
